name: Too-Busy-to-Cook Beef Sandwiches/cp
recipeInstructions: Use one package of Good Seasonings mix per pound of meat. Too busy to cook during the summer? Need a filling dinner or party main dish? The following gets you out of the kitchen and away from the grill. Place all ingredients in a crockpot and cook overnight on medium/high (or 8 hours during the day). Remove meat, allow it to cool slightly, then shred with two forks and set aside. Mix 1 tablespoon cornstarch with 1/2 cup water until smooth, then stir into the leftover cooking liquid until slightly thickened. Return shredded meat to the sauce and serve on hard rolls, hamburger buns, or any other bread of your choice. Freezes well and tastes better the next day.
